theories.title: Private Credit Markets Hitting Redemption Crisis
theories.summary: Major private credit funds (Blackstone, peers) are actively gating investor withdrawals as redemption surges spike, signaling stress in supposedly 'stable' alternative assets. Multiple funds capping redemptions simultaneously suggests systemic liquidity squeeze in $2T+ market.
theories.why_signal: This was flagged yesterday at score 7; today it's multi-source with Blackstone specifically naming it. Gating is the canary — suggests fund managers fear liquidity mismatch if redemptions continue.

posts.title: Blackstone's Private Credit Fund Joins Peers In Gating Investors After Surge In Redemptions
Blackstone private credit fund caps withdrawals as redemption requests surge

theories.title: AI Systems Failing Security via Social Engineering
theories.summary: Meta's AI support bot was exploited to seize high-profile Instagram accounts (Obama White House, Space Force); hackers simply asked the AI to grant access. Reveals fundamental AI vulnerability to social engineering at scale.
theories.why_signal: This was theory #1 yesterday at score 9; now it's showing concrete exploit chains. Meta AI compromise is proof-of-concept for broader AI social engineering risk.

posts.title: Hackers Used Meta's AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
Podcast: Hackers Asked Meta AI To Let Them In. It Worked

theories.title: Iran War Fray: Ceasefire Claims vs. Reality
theories.summary: Trump administration claims ceasefire with Iran is holding, but Hezbollah explicitly rejected terms, Israel continues attacks in Lebanon, and both sides conducting tit-for-tat strikes. Messaging and reality sharply diverged.
theories.why_signal: Yesterday Iran ceasefire was score 10; today it's fractioning into evidence that 'ceasefire' is fictional—multiple kinetic attacks, official rejections, and strategic deception by US about war status.

posts.title: Stop Calling It a Ceasefire
Hezbollah Chief Rejects US-Mediated Israel Truce; Trump To Maintain Ceasefire With Iran Unless American Troops Killed

theories.title: Trump Administration Bypassing Normal Vetting Processes
theories.summary: Senate GOP openly rebelling against Trump DNI/intelligence picks (Pulte, Gabbard resignation mid-tenure); House passing Ukraine aid Trump opposes; rare primary losses (Feenstra in Iowa). Admin consolidating power but facing institutional friction.
theories.why_signal: Yesterday this was score 8; now it's showing cracks in Trump's own party (Thune explicitly breaking with Trump on Pulte, multiple GOP senators on intelligence picks) plus actual primary loss in Iowa.

posts.title: Trump-backed Rep. Randy Feenstra loses Iowa governor primary
John Thune breaks with Trump on DNI pick Bill Pulte, weaponization fund

theories.title: Tech Layoffs + AI Redundancy Collapse Narrative
theories.summary: JoblessClaimsJump; tech firms announcing most job cuts in 2 years; simultaneously MarketWatch reports 'human workers are cheaper than AI.' AI spending spree backfiring as cost projections fail to materialize.
theories.why_signal: New narrative consolidation today: AI hype cycle inflating then deflating. Companies burned billions on AI infrastructure, now discovering labor costs lower—driving cascading layoffs.

posts.title: The job market is actually getting a boost from AI: Turns out human workers are cheaper
Jobless Claims Jump As US Tech Firms Announce Most Job Cuts In 2 Years

theories.title: Corporate Media Crackdown on Integrity (60 Minutes)
theories.summary: CBS News fired Scott Pelley (60 Minutes anchor) under Bari Weiss leadership; four of seven full-time correspondents now gone. Staff worried about editorial direction and what content survives.
theories.why_signal: New cultural signal: major newsroom purge underway. Pelley's ouster framed as principled stand vs. corporate pressure—suggests newsroom-level conflict over editorial independence.

posts.title: Scott Pelley, star of 60 Minutes, stood up for his principles and lost his job
CBS News insiders worry how 60 Minutes will endure after firings: 'What are they going to put on the air?'

theories.title: Energy Shock Cascading Through Asia & Europe
theories.summary: Europe bracing for 11% annual energy price increases; Asia oil-poor nations facing emerging market crisis; rice prices jumping; global food + energy inflation coupling.
theories.why_signal: New multi-region cascade signal. Iran war + supply disruptions driving commodity shocks; impacts cascading geographically across emerging markets.

posts.title: Europe Scrambles to Contain the Energy Shock
Iran War: US Attempts Project Freedom 2.0 as Israel Continues Attacks in Lebanon

theories.title: Left Populism Outperforming Centrist Democrats
theories.summary: Josh Turek (establishment Dem, Paralympic athlete) won Iowa Senate; socialists gaining in swing states; pro-Palestine Adam Hamawy won NJ despite media smear; California centrists narrowly held.
theories.why_signal: Yesterday this was score 8; holding steady today with new data points (Hamawy win, socialist momentum) suggesting primary realignment is real, not noise.

posts.title: Establishment Dems Stave Off the Left in Key California Congressional Primaries
Adam Hamawy, Doctor Who Volunteered in Gaza, Poised to Become Pro-Palestine Rep. From New Jersey

theories.title: Quantum Computing IPO Hype vs. Fundamentals Decoupling
theories.summary: Quantinuum IPO valued $18B+ despite losing millions annually; market euphoria on sector belief, not unit economics. Parallels to 2021 SPAC bubble.
theories.why_signal: New market signal: speculative froth forming in quantum sector. Similar to SpaceX valuation story—Wall Street buying narrative over cash flow.

posts.title: Quantinuum's stock set to pop after IPO as Wall Street buys into the quantum boom
Quantum Computing Is Having Its Public Market Moment

theories.title: Biological/Agricultural Supply Chain Ruptures Surfacing
theories.summary: Flesh-eating screwworm detected in Texas (first in 60 years, breached US-Mexico border); salmonella recalls cascading through food supply; livestock industry vulnerability exposed.
theories.why_signal: New biological alarm signal. Screwworm breach suggests border biosecurity gaps; coupled with food recalls signals fragile agricultural infrastructure under stress.

posts.title: Flesh-Eating Screwworm Detected In Texas, Threatening Already-Strained U.S. Cattle Herd
Alarm as once-eradicated flesh-eating parasite found in calf in Texas
